message:
test(e2e): add session lifecycle CLI tests (bd-idw)

Append ~751 lines of E2E CLI tests covering session lifecycle operations:

- write_rich_session() helper: creates a multi-entry session JSONL with
  header, user/assistant messages, model_change, and thinking_level_change
  entries for realistic session state testing
- Session resume, fork, tree navigation, and branch operations
- Session file validation and entry integrity checks
- All tests use the CliTestHarness infrastructure with deterministic
  session fixtures

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
